subcodes.first_line: The Light of Proof hath, verily, from the presence of the All-Merciful been made manifest in truth, and hath indeed dawned from the horizon of man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نور البرهان قد کان من لدی الرحمن بالحق مشهودا انه قد اشرق من افق الانسان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
